headline: Biogen, on the heels of a $5.6B buyout, turns its sights to early-stage assets
summary: In an interview, Chief Financial Officer Robin Kramer said the combined cash flow from Biogen and Apellis will not only help debt leverage ratios but also free up capacity to do other strategic deals.

raw.headline: Biogen, on the heels of a $5.6B buyout, turns its sights to early-stage assets
raw.summary: In an interview, Chief Financial Officer Robin Kramer said the combined cash flow from Biogen and Apellis will not only help debt leverage ratios but also free up capacity to do other strategic deals.

headline: SRRK Stock Jumps on Resubmission of FDA Filing for SMA Drug
summary: Scholar Rock stock jumps 14% after it resubmits its FDA filing for SMA drug apitegromab, revives approval hopes and sets up a potential September 2026 decision.

raw.headline: SRRK Stock Jumps on Resubmission of FDA Filing for SMA Drug
raw.summary: Scholar Rock stock jumps 14% after it resubmits its FDA filing for SMA drug apitegromab, revives approval hopes and sets up a potential September 2026 decision.

headline: Biogen to Acquire Apellis for $5.6B to Strengthen Immunology Portfolio
summary: BIIB's $5.6B offer to acquire APLS is set to add two key immunology drugs, boosting near-term revenues and strengthening its push into high-growth rare disease markets.

raw.headline: Biogen to Acquire Apellis for $5.6B to Strengthen Immunology Portfolio
raw.summary: BIIB's $5.6B offer to acquire APLS is set to add two key immunology drugs, boosting near-term revenues and strengthening its push into high-growth rare disease markets.

headline: LLY to Buy Neuroscience Biotech Centessa Pharmaceuticals in $7.8B Deal
summary: Lilly is set to acquire Centessa for up to $7.8B, adds sleep disorder drugs and advances its push to diversify beyond obesity and diabetes treatments.

raw.headline: LLY to Buy Neuroscience Biotech Centessa Pharmaceuticals in $7.8B Deal

headline: Apellis Pharmaceuticals (APLS) Moves 135.4% Higher: Will This Strength Last?
summary: Apellis Pharmaceuticals (APLS) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.

headline: Biogen uplifts rare disease pipeline with $5.6bn Apellis buyout
summary: This acquisition will add Syfovre and Empaveli to Biogen’s portfolio of medicines.

headline: Apellis Pharmaceuticals (APLS) Hits 2-Year High on 140% Upside from Biogen Merger
summary: Apellis Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ:APLS) is one of the 10 Stocks Dominating Today’s Market Surge. Apellis Pharmaceuticals climbed to a new two-year high on Tuesday, as investors gobbled up shares following news that it was set to be acquired by Biogen Inc. at a 140-percent upside. In intra-day trading, the stock soared to its highest price […]
